steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence emphasizing a similarity between Crocodile Lake NWR and Pearl Harbor NWR. The notes state both were established to protect a specific endangered species — that shared founding purpose is the key similarity.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Both the Crocodile Lake NWR and the Pearl Harbor NWR were established to protect endangered species.: directly states what both refuges share, using "Both" to link them. ✓
  • Choice B — Some NWRs, such as Hawaii's Pearl Harbor, were established specifically to protect endangered species.: discusses only one of the two refuges. ✗
  • Choice C — While the Crocodile Lake NWR extends across a 6,686-acre area, the Pearl Harbor NWR encompasses only 61 acres.: emphasizes a difference (size) rather than a similarity. ✗
  • Choice D — The US has designated more than 500 areas NWRs, including the Crocodile Lake NWR in Florida.: discusses only one of the two refuges. ✗
That is the correct answer.
